message:
test(oracle): add 22 conformance test suites covering broad SQL semantics

Tests cover: REPLACE, BETWEEN, compound SELECT, EXISTS, CAST, DELETE/UPDATE
complex, ORDER BY expressions, INSERT...SELECT, DISTINCT, triggers, NULL
functions, multi-JOIN, expression SELECT, integer overflow, LIKE, GROUP BY
multi-column, negative numbers/sign, aggregates on empty tables, concat
edge cases, complex WHERE with NULLs, scalar subquery columns, GLOB,
UPDATE with subquery SET, multi-value IN, CASE with aggregates, autoincrement,
savepoints, COALESCE+JOIN, recursive CTE, multi-aggregate, DEFAULT VALUES,
blob functions, mixed type comparisons, multi-CTE, views, foreign keys.

All 1959 tests pass (1 pre-existing WITHOUT ROWID failure, 2 ignored).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
